purpose: Own demo-only agent graph payload parsing, append-edge buffer helpers, and command-loop API protocol wiring.
invariants: Feature helpers take explicit inputs instead of importing demo main state.
Graph lifecycle, DOM state, and render calls remain in demo/src/main.ts.
The command loop preserves the /agent/commands polling and /agent/ack acknowledgement protocol.
Payload conversion receives demo space sizing from the caller.
change_protocols: When adding agent commands, update types.ts and the stateful dispatcher in demo/src/main.ts together.
When changing the polling protocol, keep command-loop.ts configurable for tests and dev-server wiring.
When moving more code out of main.ts, prefer pure helpers here unless the code needs live graph state.
